title: Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple
tagline: Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple, also known as the Pachaimalai Balamurugan Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan, located near Gobichettipalayam in Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: The Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple, also known as the Pachaimalai Balamurugan Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan, located near Gobichettipalayam in Tamil Nadu. The temple is constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, and is located on top of a small hillock. The current structure was built in 1956, and was expanded in 1980.

topPlaces.name: Nerunjipettai
topPlaces.description: Nerunjipettai is a panchayat town in Bhavani taluk of Erode district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in the north-western part of the state.

topPlaces.name: Lower Mettur Hydroelectric Project
topPlaces.description: Lower Mettur Hydroelectric Project is a hydropower generation project in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a 120MW power generation project constructed across the Kaveri River.

topPlaces.name: Hangala
topPlaces.description: Hangala is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Gundlupet taluk of Chamarajanagar district.

topPlaces.name: Mettur Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: The Mettur Thermal Power Station is a coal-fired electric power station located in [Thoppur-Mettur Dam-Bhavani-Erode Rd, Mettur, Tamil Nadu 636406] Salem district of Tamil Nadu. It is operated by Tamil Nadu Power Generation Corporation Limited.

topPlaces.name: Poolampatti
topPlaces.description: Poolampatti is a panchayat town in Idappadi taluk of Salem district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 31 panchayat towns in the district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (108 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pachaimalai Subramanya Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nerunjipettai, Lower Mettur Hydroelectric Project, Hangala, Mettur Thermal Power Station, Poolampatti.
